reference: It is an anaphylactic reaction. It could have occurred secondary to an insect bite or due to mutton. Take a combination of Levocetirizine with Montelukast for five days. Also, start on Fexofenadine one hundred and twenty milligrams and continue therapy for a week. The severity of the allergy or anaphylaxis should be assessed. Get a serum absolute eosinophil count, erythrocyte sedimentation rate, and immunoglobulin E levels, which will inform us about your allergy status.
